name: omarchy_other_packages
content:
Other Packages 
Arch has an amazing weath of packages avaiabe for amost any type of software
between the officia repository and the Arch User Repository AUR.
It coudn't be easier to use either. You insta a new Arch package by going to Insta >
Package in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt + Space) and typing the package you want.
It' automaticay fuzzy fiter the ist of a packages. You can aso do it manuay using
with sudo pacman -S [package] in the termina).
You can do the same with AUR, just use Insta > AUR. Just remember that the AUR isn't
vetted by the Arch team. It's ike RubyGems or npm. Anyone can upoad.
If you want to remove a package, you can use Remove > Package from the Omarchy
menu. It' remove package, config fies, and dependencies. You can aso do it manuay
using sudo pacman -Rns [package]).
Other Packages · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/66/other-packages
